title: DU MTech Admission 2026

detail.title: DU MTech Admission 2026
detail.short_info: DU MTech Admission 2026 for M.Tech. (Microwaves & Communication) has been announced. GATE scores will get first preference, followed by CUET PG (MTQP05) for vacant seats. Check eligibility, 30 seats category-wise matrix and separate admission portal details.

content.text: DU MTech Admission 2026 applications for M.Tech. (Microwaves & Communication) will be conducted through a separate portal. The University of Delhi has received AICTE approval and will accept valid GATE scores with first preference, followed by CUET (PG) 2026 (MTQP05) for vacant seats.

The University of Delhi (DU) has introduced M.Tech. (Microwaves & Communication) programme for the academic session 2026-27 under the Department of Electronic Science. This is the first time DU is accepting GATE scores for admission to this postgraduate engineering programme following AICTE approval.
Direct Official Notification PDF: Click Here

rows: B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. Engg. (4 years) in Electrical/Electronics/Electronics and Communication/Instrumentation/Radio Physics & Electronics Engineering
Valid GATE Score / Qualified CUET (PG) MTQP05
M.Sc. Electronics or M.Sc. Physics/Applied Physics with specialization in Electronics
Valid GATE Score / Qualified CUET (PG) MTQP05
Four-year B.Sc. (Honours/Honours with Research) Physics with Minor/Specialisation in Electronics / Four-Year B.Sc. (Honours) Electronics
Valid GATE Score / Qualified CUET (PG) MTQP05
Four-Year B.Sc. (Honours) with Major in Electronics
Valid GATE Score / Qualified CUET (PG) MTQP05

content.text: - Candidates with a valid GATE score will be given first preference based on merit in their respective categories. - If seats remain vacant, they will be filled by candidates who qualified CUET (PG) 2026 (Paper Code: MTQP05). - Admission will not be done through the CSAS (PG) portal. - A separate registration portal will be opened for this programme.
Candidates are advised to regularly visit admission.uod.ac.in for updates regarding the separate portal.
